Senior Product Manager

About CTeBS

CTeBS (Classic Technologies & Business Solutions) is a technology company building an integrated ecosystem of software products for the fashion manufacturing industry. As a subsidiary of Classic Fashion, one of the leading garment manufacturers, CTeBS develops software products that are first tested within Classic Fashion's operations and then offered to external customers. This model ensures products are battle-tested in real production environments before market release.

Role Overview

We seek a Senior Product Manager to lead and grow the Product Management function at CTeBS. This player-coach role involves directly owning one or more software products while mentoring a team of 3 product professionals. The ideal candidate combines product management expertise with hands-on manufacturing operations knowledge, particularly in apparel, garments, textiles, or adjacent industries.

Key Responsibilities

  • Product Ownership & Strategy: Own the end-to-end lifecycle of one or more CTeBS software products, from ideation to iteration. Define roadmaps aligned with internal and external needs. Conduct market research and competitive analysis to identify product-market fit. Transition internally matured products into market-ready offerings.
  • Team Leadership & Mentorship: Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 3 product professionals. Establish best practices, conduct 1:1s, product reviews, and retrospectives. Foster a culture of data-driven decisions and continuous learning.
  • Stakeholder Management: Interface with manufacturing leadership, balance internal and external requirements, and collaborate with engineering, design, QA, and delivery teams. Present strategies and outcomes to senior stakeholders.
  • Domain Application: Leverage garment manufacturing expertise to identify opportunities in production planning, quality inspection, and compliance tracking. Translate workflows into intuitive software solutions.

Required Qualifications

  • 12+ years of professional experience, including 6–7+ years in product management roles.
  • Proven experience in manufacturing software (ERP, MES, PLM, etc.) and garment/apparel manufacturing.
  • Demonstrated leadership in managing/mentoring product managers.
  • Strong Agile/Scrum expertise and cross-functional team collaboration.
  • Analytical skills using data for product decisions.
  • B2B SaaS commercialization experience (internal to external product transition).
  • Familiarity with Industry 4.0 concepts (IoT, real-time monitoring, digital twins).
  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, or related field; MBA is a plus.

What We Offer

  • Opportunity to build and lead the Product Management function at a growing smart factory software company.
  • Direct impact: products used on real manufacturing floors serving global fashion brands.
  • Unique product development model with real-world validation before market release.
  • Collaborative work environment in Kochi with exposure to global operations.

Contact: Apply by sharing your resume at careers@ctebs.com.
summary: Lead and grow the Product Management function at CTeBS, developing battle-tested software for fashion manufacturing. Requires 12+ years of experience, manufacturing domain expertise, and B2B SaaS commercialization skills.
